person.name: Joan Despenser
person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
«b»Biography«/b»
Joan le Despenser, was born about 1264 in Southampton, England. She was the daughter of Sir Hugh le Despenser (b. c 1223, d. 4 Aug 1265) by Aliva (Aline) Basset (b. 1245, d. c 11 Apr 1281).

Joan married Sir Thomas de Furnival (b. c 1260, d. 3 Feb 1332), 1st Lord Furnivall in Loughborough, Leicestershire, England. A settlement for the marriage was made on 13 January 1273:

"Thomas de Furnyvall came into chancery and acknowledged that he owed to Joan, daughter of Hugh le Despenser, 1,000 marks, on condition that if Thomas de Furnyvall, son and heir of the said Thomas, now a minor, married to Joan with his father's will, shall presume to do anything against that marriage when he shall come of age, Thomas his father shall pay to Joan the said 1,000 marks within the first year after Thomas the son shall have protested (reclamaverit) against the marriage. which sum shall be levied in default of payment of his lands and chattels in co. York."

«b»They had two sons and four daughters:«/b»
1.) Sir Thomas, 2nd Lord Furnival (c 1292-14 Oct 1339)

2.) Gilbert (1290-1322)

3.) Maud (c 1284-after 30 Nov 1348), wife of Sir John Marmion, 2nd Lord Marmion, & of Sir Roger la Zouche

4.) Katherine/Catherine (c 1294-1349), wife of Willilam de Thwenge, 2nd Lord Thwenge

5.) Eleanor (c 1286-1335), wife of Peter de Mauley, 4th Lord Mauley

6.)  Aline (born c 1282)

While it was previously believed that Joan (Despenser) de Furnival died before 8 June 1322 in Worksop, Sheffield, Nottinghamshire, England, a newly discovered document indicates that she died in 1314 or earlier: "In Hilary term 1314 Stephen de Stanham sued Thomas de Furnivall, Adam de Brom, and John, parson of the church of Whistan, Yorkshire, executors of the will of Joan late the wife of Thomas de Furnivall, in the Court of Common Pleas regarding a debt of 100s."

zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Despenser於1263年出生在英國萊希斯特斯爾洛賀波洛時，她的父親Hugh Le Despenser40歲，母親Aline Basset35歲。她於大約1275年1月與Thomas de Furnival在英國英格蘭越可爾雪菲爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1322年6月8日在英國諾廷加姆爾華索普享年59歲。

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Despenser was born in 1263, in Loughborough, Leicestershire, England, her father, Hugh Le Despenser, was 40 and her mother, Aline Basset, was 35. She married Thomas de Furnival about January 1275, in Sheffield, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 4 daughters. She died on 8 June 1322, in Warsop, Nottinghamshire, England, at the age of 59.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Despenser est née en 1263, à Loughborough, Leicestershire, Angleterre, son père, Hugh Le Despenser, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Aline Basset, avait 35 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas de Furnival environ janvier 1275, à Sheffield, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 8 juin 1322, à Warsop, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 59 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Despenserが1263年にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアロウボロウで生まれた時，父Hugh Le Despenserは40歳，母Aline Bassetは35歳であった。約1275年1月にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアシェフィールドでThomas de Furnivalと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1322年6月8日にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアワーソップで59歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Despenser(이)가 1263년 영국 레이스스터실르 루그h버루에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hugh Le Despenser(은)는 40세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Aline Basset(은)는 35세였다. 그녀는 대략 1275년 1월 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 셰필드에서 Thomas de Furnival(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1322년 6월 8일 영국 노틴그함실르 워소프에서 59세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Despenser nasceu em 1263, em Loughborough, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Hugh Le Despenser, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Aline Basset, tinha 35 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas de Furnival aproximadamente janeiro de 1275, em Sheffield, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 8 de junho de 1322, em Warsop, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, com 59 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Despenser родилась в 1263 г. в местности лоугбороую, лисестиршир, Англия, её отцу по имени Hugh Le Despenser было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Aline Basset, 35. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas de Furnival около январь 1275 г. в местности шеффиелд, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери. Она умерла 8 июня 1322 г. в местности варсоп, ноттингхамшир, Англия в возрасте 59 лет.
